title: Medications
description: Medications are used to list and describe the history of medications prescribed or consumed by the patient.

bindings.title: Medications (all SNOMED CT)
bindings.note: Searching medication codes using a complete edition of SNOMED CT.

bindings.title: Medications (IPS Refset)
bindings.ecl: ((< 373873005 |Pharmaceutical / biologic product (product)|) MINUS (<< 787859002 |Vaccine product (medicinal product)|)) AND (^816080008 |International Patient Summary|)
bindings.note: Searching medication codes using members of the IPS Refset only.
